data.body:
## Description

Create `tests/scripts/test-ticket-benchmark.sh` with behavioral tests for the benchmark script.

## File Impact
- Create: `tests/scripts/test-ticket-benchmark.sh`
- Modify: `.test-index` (add mapping with RED marker)

## TDD Requirement (RED)
Write these specific failing tests (RED because ticket-benchmark.sh doesn't exist yet):
- `test_benchmark_exits_zero_under_threshold`: Seed 5 tickets, run benchmark with generous threshold (30s), verify exit 0
- `test_benchmark_exits_nonzero_over_threshold`: Run benchmark with impossibly low threshold (0.001s), verify exit non-zero
- `test_benchmark_outputs_timing_info`: Run benchmark with 5 tickets, verify stdout contains numeric timing value

Test approach: Each test creates a temp environment (using `mktemp -d` + `trap 'rm -rf $tmpdir' EXIT`), runs benchmark with controlled parameters, checks exit code/output.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Test file exists at `tests/scripts/test-ticket-benchmark.sh`
  Verify: test -f tests/scripts/test-ticket-benchmark.sh
- [ ] Test file contains at least 3 test functions
  Verify: grep -c '^test_' tests/scripts/test-ticket-benchmark.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 3)}'
- [ ] All tests fail (RED) — zero PASS results
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-ticket-benchmark.sh 2>&1 | grep -c 'PASS' | awk '{exit ($1 != 0)}'
- [ ] `.test-index` entry maps ticket-benchmark.sh to test-ticket-benchmark.sh with RED marker
  Verify: grep -q 'ticket-benchmark.sh.*test-ticket-benchmark.sh' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
